{{Item
| image = Oyakodon.png
| id = oyakodon
| type = Food
| Subtype = Rice
| Properties = Hunger points: 7/10

Resistance: 40s

Absorption II: 20s.

Slow Falling: 20s.
| stackable = 64
| Description = Chicken and Egg Bowl - Don't search up the name meaning!
}}

'''Oyakodon''' is a '''very delicious''' food item that fills up '''7 hunger points''' and gives you:
*'''Resistance I''' for '''40 seconds.'''
*'''Absorption II''' for '''20 seconds.'''
*'''Slow Falling I''' for '''20 seconds.'''
Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|[[Rice Bowl]] 
+ Chicken
+ Egg
|[[File:Oyakodon crafting.png|484x484px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
*Oya (親) means parents, Ko (子) means child, and don (丼) is rice dish... well... you get the idea...
